changes: Condensed SKILL.md from 472 lines to ~100 lines, removing verbose examples not needed for a capable model
Added log parsing section with regex pattern for structured log extraction
Added explicit guidance for var→const/let replacement: follow task instructions literally, only use const for explicitly named variables
Retained core quick reference, JS/Python/CLI examples, and common gotchas
notes: regex-extract consistently scores 100/100. regex-replace var-replacement criterion varies due to LLM non-determinism — the model sometimes applies its own const/let judgment instead of following the task prompt's explicit variable list. Best run achieved 100/100 on both tasks.
